creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 215488
deprecate-py-django-subdomains.patch

Hi,

attached is the patch that deprecates www/py-django-subdomains and sets an expiration date for it because the package isn't compatible with Django 2.0+ (see also issue #69 at the upstream repository which has no activity since 2016). 

Django 1.11 is End-Of-Life since April and most ports have been switched to Django 2.2 (current LTS release) in the meantime.
